name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: King Plus Adult Dog Food - Beef 3kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein and brewer's yeast for immune support . Carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult's large breed dogs.
description: King Plus Beef Adult Dog , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein and brewer's yeast for immune support. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adults large breed dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ...................18% Fat........................7% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)... 4% INGREDIENTS: Wheat, Corn, Processed Animal Protein, Wheat Middlings, Boncalit, Animal Fat, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Flavour, Flaxseed, Salt, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
